name: Magic wand
short_description: This game immerses you in a captivating world of immortals and heroes
detailed_description:
This game takes you into a charming world of immortals and heroes, with exquisite and delicate graphics that resemble a flowing landscape painting. The quaint town is nestled between green mountains and clear waters, with small bridges, flowing water, and homes, as if one could hear the distant birds chirping and the murmuring of streams. The role guidance is clear, and you will play the role of a treasure hunter, exploring the unknown in this mysterious world. With your footsteps, the treasure hidden in the mountains and waters gradually appears, and every discovery is accompanied by a surprising sound effect, leading you deep into this fantastic adventure journey.
Gameplay
You need to find all three treasures in order to win.
